rulings.Case Title: IN RE: STANLEY CHONG KWONG
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Seeking Leave To Amend First Amended Petition
rulings.Rulings: This tentative ruling is issued by Judge Joseph M. Quinn. Petitioner's belated request for single assignment of this case is DENIED. The request, which was never noticed and first made in the reply brief on the motion for leave to amend, is not properly before the court. Petitioner's unopposed motion for leave to amend is GRANTED. The court notes, however, that amendment will not excuse prompt adjudication of the petition. Petitioner shall file and serve the Second Amended Petition (as proposed) within 5 days of the date this order is filed. Respondent shall file her responsive pleading within 30 days of the date that Petitioner files and serves the Second Amended Petition. Petitioner shall lodge with the clerk in Department 204 by the time set for this hearing a proposed order consistent with this tentative. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. on Tuesday, August 27, 2019.
